profile.title: Physical profile
profile.subtitle: Used as the reference for body-weight and age-based scoring. Stored on this device (Core, no account required).
profile.completeBadge: Baseline complete — ready for assessment inputs that use height, weight, age, and gender.
profile.incompleteHint: Add your body data so later assessments can convert real metrics to scores.
profile.isAnonymousInLadder: Hide my identity on ladder (anonymous mode)

errors.invalid-gender: Gender must be male or female.
errors.invalid-height: Height must be between 120 and 230 cm.
errors.invalid-weight: Weight must be between 35 and 250 kg.
errors.invalid-city: For Taiwan, please choose a valid city.
errors.invalid-district: District must belong to the selected city.

ladderIdentity.title: Ladder name & avatar
ladderIdentity.subtitle: Shown on the leaderboard when you upload scores. Stored on this device; avatar is compressed before save.
ladderIdentity.avatarHint: Square photo works best. JPEG/PNG, resized automatically.
ladderIdentity.errorImage: Could not process this image. Try another file or a smaller photo.
ladderIdentity.errorImageTooLarge: Image is still too large after compression. Try a smaller original file.
ladderIdentity.errorSave: Could not save. Please try again.

diagnostics.archetypeHint: Homologation profile derived from your six-axis performance map.

overallGrade.BASE: 「STOCK COMMUTER」Factory-stock daily driver. Architecture still awaiting full unlock.
overallGrade.TIER_41: 「STREET MODIFIED」Entry street tune. Baseline driveline efficiency and throttle response improved.
overallGrade.TIER_51: 「STAGE 1 TUNE」Stage-one calibration. Power platform now taking shape.
overallGrade.TIER_61: 「CLUB TRACK SPEC」Club track build. Chassis rigidity beyond stock norms.
overallGrade.TIER_71: 「TRACKDAY ENTHUSIAST」Weekend hot-lap spec. Control and heat-soak resistance markedly higher.
overallGrade.TIER_81: 「AMATEUR TIME ATTACK」Amateur time-attack class. High fill-rate efficiency with real track pressure.
overallGrade.TIER_91: 「UNLIMITED ATTACK」Unlimited time-attack ruleset. Peak power and grip in perfect mesh.
overallGrade.TIER_101: 「GT4 CHAMPIONSHIP」Regional GT4 homologation. Driveline efficiency at podium threshold.
overallGrade.TIER_111: 「GT3 COMPETITION」Elite international GT3. High torque and max aero in full alignment.
overallGrade.TIER_121: 「GTE PRO SPEC」Pro Le Mans GTE. Dominant mechanical efficiency under extreme sustained load.
overallGrade.TIER_131: 「FACTORY PROTOTYPE」Factory prototype racer. Perfect mechanics under full-load high-pressure output.
overallGrade.TIER_141: 「HYPERCAR TIER」Top hypercar class. Unbelievable transient launch reserve.
overallGrade.LEGEND: 「LEGENDARY MONSTER」Legendary build monster. The ultimate crystallization of pure mechanical will.
overallGrade.PANTHEON: 「PANTHEON EXPERIMENTAL」Pantheon experimental. Beyond normal definition — data archived to the Pantheon.

home.overallFormula: Sum of six core scores ÷ 6 (arm circumference excluded).
home.radarWeakestHint: Current bottleneck: {{axis}} ({{score}}). Prioritize this axis next.
